# VERTIQ

> VERTIQ (Vertiq Vertical Mobility Pvt. Ltd.) designs, manufactures and
> maintains elevators, escalators and vertical-mobility systems in India.
> Founded 1968. Headquarters: Vertiq House, G Block, Bandra Kurla Complex,
> Mumbai 400 051, Maharashtra, India. Sales: +91 22 6789 1968 ·
> sales@vertiq.in · 24/7 emergency line: 1800 209 1968.

VERTIQ manufactures twelve product families: passenger elevators, home
elevators, high-speed elevators (6–12+ m/s), machine-room-less (MRL)
elevators, panoramic elevators, capsule elevators, hospital bed/stretcher
elevators, freight elevators (up to 10,000 kg, including vehicle/car
elevators), dumbwaiters and service lifts, escalators, moving walkways, and
elevator components (gearless machines, regenerative drives, Pulse™
controllers, fixtures, safety gear). Systems are engineered to IS 14665 and
EN 81-20/50. Lifecycle services cover installation, preventive and
predictive maintenance, modernization and annual maintenance contracts.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.vertiq.in/): interactive 3D elevator experience and company overview
- [Products](https://www.vertiq.in/products): all twelve product families with specifications
- [Passenger Elevators](https://www.vertiq.in/products/passenger-elevators)
- [Home Elevators](https://www.vertiq.in/products/home-elevators)
- [High-Speed Elevators](https://www.vertiq.in/products/high-speed-elevators)
- [MRL Elevators](https://www.vertiq.in/products/mrl-elevators)
- [Hospital Elevators](https://www.vertiq.in/products/hospital-elevators)
- [Freight Elevators](https://www.vertiq.in/products/freight-elevators)
- [About](https://www.vertiq.in/about): history since 1968, manufacturing infrastructure, leadership
- [Contact](https://www.vertiq.in/contact): consultations, quotations, service enquiries

## Facts

- Legal name: Vertiq Vertical Mobility Pvt. Ltd.
- Founded: 1968 (Pune, India)
- Market: India (pan-India sales and service network)
- Standards: IS 14665, EN 81-20/50
- IoT platform: Pulse™ (connected monitoring and predictive maintenance)
